subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, imprisoned, sendeth salutations unto them that drink from the Kawthar of the All-Merciful's love, and saith: I swear by the lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم مسجون شاربان کوثر محبت رحمن را تکبیر میرساند و میگوید قسم بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
